neo-blythe.label: Neo Blythe / factory 12-inch doll
neo-blythe.sourceNotes: Blythe official height plus DIY Craft Club factory body girths; shoulder/armhole are drafting values pending in-house fit test.

barbie-vintage.label: Vintage / old-style Barbie 12-inch doll
barbie-vintage.sourceNotes: Knitting-and.com old-style Barbie measurements. Do not assume modern Barbie fit.

american-girl-18.label: American Girl style 18-inch doll
american-girl-18.sourceNotes: Susan Kramer / Rosie / Pixie Faire 18-inch doll measurement ranges. Large format requires tiled output; blocked from product PDF until tiling is added.
